name: MCP iCal Server
description: Transform how you interact with your macOS calendar using natural language via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Provides natural language calendar management including event creation, updates, schedule queries, and calendar management.

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List calendar events in a date range.

calendar_name.description: Optional calendar name to filter by

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create a new calendar event with details like title, time, location, notes, reminders, and recurrence.

tools.name: update_event
tools.description: Update an existing calendar event with new details such as time, location, notes, reminders, and recurrence.

resources.name: calendars://list
resources.description: List all available calendars that can be used with calendar operations.
